ancestorTitles: Happy path: steps 1–6 in correct order and role
assertionResults.fullName: Certification Chain E2E (steps 1–12) Happy path: steps 1–6 in correct order and role walks through all 6 REST-triggered transitions
assertionResults.title: walks through all 6 REST-triggered transitions

assertionResults.fullName: Certification Chain E2E (steps 1–12) Guard: out-of-order call returns 400 returns 400 when submitting an already-SUBMITTED certification
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when submitting an already-SUBMITTED certification

assertionResults.fullName: Certification Chain E2E (steps 1–12) Guard: out-of-order call returns 400 returns 400 when trying to start-review a DRAFT (not SUBMITTED)
assertionResults.title: returns 400 when trying to start-review a DRAFT (not SUBMITTED)

assertionResults.fullName: Certification Chain E2E (steps 1–12) Guard: wrong-role call returns 403 returns 403 when cooperative-admin calls start-review
assertionResults.title: returns 403 when cooperative-admin calls start-review

assertionResults.fullName: Certification Chain E2E (steps 1–12) Guard: wrong-role call returns 403 returns 401 when unauthenticated
assertionResults.title: returns 401 when unauthenticated

ancestorTitles: Steps 8–12: final review, grant, deny, renew
assertionResults.fullName: Certification Chain E2E (steps 1–12) Steps 8–12: final review, grant, deny, renew POST start-final-review moves LAB_RESULTS_RECEIVED → UNDER_REVIEW (certification-body)
assertionResults.title: POST start-final-review moves LAB_RESULTS_RECEIVED → UNDER_REVIEW (certification-body)

ancestorTitles: Steps 8–12: final review, grant, deny, renew
assertionResults.fullName: Certification Chain E2E (steps 1–12) Steps 8–12: final review, grant, deny, renew POST start-final-review returns 403 for cooperative-admin (wrong role)
assertionResults.title: POST start-final-review returns 403 for cooperative-admin (wrong role)

ancestorTitles: Steps 8–12: final review, grant, deny, renew
assertionResults.fullName: Certification Chain E2E (steps 1–12) Steps 8–12: final review, grant, deny, renew PATCH grant returns 400 when cert is LAB_RESULTS_RECEIVED (guard tightened to UNDER_REVIEW)
assertionResults.title: PATCH grant returns 400 when cert is LAB_RESULTS_RECEIVED (guard tightened to UNDER_REVIEW)

ancestorTitles: Steps 8–12: final review, grant, deny, renew
assertionResults.fullName: Certification Chain E2E (steps 1–12) Steps 8–12: final review, grant, deny, renew PATCH grant moves UNDER_REVIEW → GRANTED (certification-body)
assertionResults.title: PATCH grant moves UNDER_REVIEW → GRANTED (certification-body)

ancestorTitles: Steps 8–12: final review, grant, deny, renew
assertionResults.fullName: Certification Chain E2E (steps 1–12) Steps 8–12: final review, grant, deny, renew PATCH deny moves UNDER_REVIEW → DENIED (certification-body)
assertionResults.title: PATCH deny moves UNDER_REVIEW → DENIED (certification-body)

ancestorTitles: Steps 8–12: final review, grant, deny, renew
assertionResults.fullName: Certification Chain E2E (steps 1–12) Steps 8–12: final review, grant, deny, renew POST renew moves GRANTED → RENEWED and returns new DRAFT cert (cooperative-admin)
assertionResults.title: POST renew moves GRANTED → RENEWED and returns new DRAFT cert (cooperative-admin)

ancestorTitles: Steps 8–12: final review, grant, deny, renew
assertionResults.fullName: Certification Chain E2E (steps 1–12) Steps 8–12: final review, grant, deny, renew POST renew returns 400 when cert is UNDER_REVIEW (not GRANTED)
